title: Gemini AI Pro 1-Year Top-up
subtitle: Subscribe your own Google / Gemini account to Google AI Pro for one year. Individual account subscription, not a family group.

detail.title: Gemini AI Pro 1-Year Top-up
detail.subtitle: Auto-delivered CDKey for subscribing your own Google / Gemini account to Google AI Pro for one year.

sections.title: What You Get
items: Subscribe your own Google / Gemini account to Google AI Pro for one year
Individual account subscription, not a family group
You can check the membership expiration date after activation
One order covers one Gemini account for one year

sections.title: Delivery & Setup
items: The CDKey is delivered automatically after payment
Follow the instructions to complete the subscription yourself
Please use your own Google / Gemini account for activation

sections.title: After-sales Policy
items: Once the subscription is completed, the service is considered fulfilled
We only provide the subscription activation service
Future Google official benefits, activities, or policy changes are subject to Google and are not guaranteed by this platform

sections.title: Privacy & Security
items: We do not keep your account information
Submitted information is only used temporarily for subscription activation and is deleted after completion
For account security, please update your 2FA and password after completion
